response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced staff-level engineer with strong TypeScript/Node.js skills and even matches several nice-to-haves (LLM/MCP tooling, Kubernetes, AWS), but this is an entry-level junior/mid position, creating a significant seniority mismatch with likely salary, engagement, and retention risks. Additionally, the role requires high on-site presence while the candidate is based in Lagos, Nigeria, and core stack elements like PostgreSQL and Nest.js are not clearly evidenced.
strengths: Strong TypeScript/Node.js fullstack experience across many production systems
Matches nice-to-haves: LLM/agent tooling, Kubernetes, AWS, and testing culture (TDD, CI/CD)
Proven ability to learn and work across diverse stacks and domains, including geo-data platforms
concerns: Heavily overqualified for an entry-level role, posing retention and compensation-fit risks
Based in Lagos, Nigeria while the role requires high on-site presence
No demonstrated PostgreSQL or Nest.js experience; database background is mainly MongoDB
